title: lithocarpus harmandii subsp. harmandii
intro: Lithocarpus harmandii subsp. harmandii, also known as the Harmand's Lithocarpus or Chinese Bur oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The Harmand's Lithocarpus is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus harmandii subsp. harmandii are often used in traditional medicine, and can be found in the form of teas, extracts, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
